title: melica inflata
intro: Melica inflata, also known as Pitted Brome or Pitted Meadow Brome, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin issues. The health benefits of Melica inflata include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Melica inflata include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
